title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint to v6.6.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [eslint](https://eslint.org) ([source](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint)) | devDependencies | minor | [`6.2.2` -> `6.6.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/eslint/6.2.2/6.6.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>eslint/eslint</summary>

### [`v6.6.0`](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/releases/v6.6.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/compare/v6.5.1...v6.6.0)
